definition: Private credit ($1.7T) degrades the yield curve's real-time signaling power for aggregate credit conditions. NAV smoothing with autocorrelation 0.5-0.7 creates 12-18 month delays in stress recognition. PIK toggle usage rising from 2% to 5-8%. These borrowers exist outside public indices, default statistics, and financial conditions indices.
evidence: NAV smoothing autocorrelation 0.5-0.7 creates 12-18 month delay in stress recognition
PIK toggle usage rising from 2% to 5-8% as early stress indicator
No agent or debate refuted this claim
open_questions: What percentage of sub-IG credit origination has migrated to private channels (estimates range 15-30%)?
How will NAV smoothing behave through a full credit cycle at current private credit scale?
Can alternative data sources provide real-time visibility into private credit stress?
